accent_strategy.description: One restrained vermilion beacon hovering as a launch warning signal.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A towering ultramarine monolith leaning over the right third as the true structural event.

historical_anchor.description: A pale shuttle stack held as a solitary launch witness before routine hardens into risk.

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Treat the orbiter and tank as a pale icon held against vast ivory silence and one heavy blue wall.

reflection_strategy.description: A calm reflective base plane translating the launch pad into a mirrored tonal field.

subject_anchor.description: A pale shuttle stack silhouette reduced to one solitary launch witness.

surreal_breach.description: The environmental boundary presses into the frame as if the cold itself has become architecture.
